name: remotion-storyboard
description: Turn video ideas into high-fidelity Markdown storyboards and runtime-specific Remotion or Manim motion plans.

interface.shortDescription: Generate high-fidelity Markdown storyboards for Remotion or Manim.
interface.longDescription: Converts rough video concepts into structured runtime-specific scene scripts, a premium Markdown storyboard handoff, and implementation guidance for Remotion or Manim.
defaultPrompt: Create a 45-second Remotion storyboard with one premium Markdown handoff.
Create a Manim scene plan with timing, mobjects, and one Markdown handoff.
